- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
Summary: File created and maintained during setup.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
Summary: Confirmed Next.js App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind + Supabase + Vercel target for a production single-author blog.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
Summary: Standard `create-next-app` failed due folder naming restrictions, so project was scaffolded manually in the current folder with equivalent production baseline.

- [x] Customize the Project
Summary: Added app structure, initial homepage, Supabase client utility, environment template, and project scripts aligned to PRD direction.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
Summary: No extensions were specified by project setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
Summary: Installed dependencies and verified `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build` all pass.

- [x] Create and Run Task
Summary: Created and started a VS Code task (`dev server`) that runs `npm run dev`.

- [x] Launch the Project
Summary: Dev server launched and debug start command executed upon user confirmation.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
Summary: README exists with setup instructions; this file is cleaned and current.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
